Title: B5 M365 Interaction Agent one-writer posture selected
Decision: Select one canonical Guided AI Labs agent lane named M365 Interaction Agent. Prime Boiler 365 setup remains a separate account/profile/session lane. The current posture remains supervised delegated and local-first. No new app registration, admin consent, SharePoint Selected grant, Exchange Application RBAC grant, broad Graph/Teams/Planner grant, or unattended production bridge adapter is approved. Immediate agent write surface after approval is limited to one Agent Action Log row with ActionStatus=Suggested per selected CRM signal through scripts/Invoke-M365NewSignalTriage.ps1 -Apply. Guided AI Labs and Guided AI Journey intake flows, plus the New Signal Teams alert flow, remain accepted create-only/source-ingress automations and are not agent decision writers.
Rationale: B1-B4 proved a useful CRM New Signal -> Teams alert -> triage -> Suggested-row loop without updating CRM, sending external messages, creating tasks, changing permissions, or granting new app power. G0-only is too narrow because the Suggested review queue is useful; app or G2/G3 authority is too broad before more source proofs. This posture preserves Adam approval while allowing B6 Guided AI Journey intake to use the same CRM signal lane.
